verifiedBoundaries: Viral upper-respiratory infection is treated as a common asthma trigger
Direct evidence that influenza vaccination prevents asthma exacerbations is explicitly uncertain

records.population: People in Australia with diagnosed COPD
verifiedBoundaries: Respiratory infections can trigger COPD exacerbations
Worsening is assessed against the person's usual symptoms
Respiratory viruses are one possible trigger
A written plan is developed and reviewed with a doctor

records.population: People with COPD using a plan prepared with a healthcare professional
verifiedBoundaries: The template is personalised with a healthcare professional
Blank rescue medicine fields are conditional rather than universal instructions
